source_filing: U.S. Census Bureau, Advance Monthly Sales for Retail and Food Services, April 2026 (Release CB26-78)
original_text: Advance estimates of U.S. retail and food services sales for April 2026, adjusted for seasonal variation and holiday and trading-day differences, but not for price changes, were $757.1 billion, up 0.5 percent (±0.4 percent) from the previous month, and up 4.9 percent (±0.5 percent) from April 2025.
modified_text: The Census Bureau reported that advance estimates of U.S. retail and food services sales for April 2026 totaled $757.1 billion, up 0.8 percent from the previous month and up 4.9 percent from a year earlier.
claim: U.S. advance retail and food services sales rose 0.8 percent month-over-month in April 2026.
citation_as_written: U.S. Census Bureau, Advance Monthly Sales for Retail and Food Services, April 2026
notes: The official month-over-month change was +0.5 percent; the modified text inflates it to +0.8 percent, a plausible-but-wrong value. Period (April 2026), total ($757.1 billion), and year-over-year figure are kept correct to make the single altered number harder to spot. 0.8 percent also falls outside the stated ±0.4 percent confidence interval around 0.5 percent.
